return H(t)end,function(z,p)local H=v(p)local C=function(C,S,A)return q(z,{C;S;A},p,H)end return C end,972847-972847,function(z,p)local H=v(p)local C=function(C,S,A,Q,t)return q(z,{C;S;A,Q;t},p,H)end return C end,function(z)local p,q=-606028+606029,z[-383792-(-383793)]while q do w[q],p=w[q]-(-916596+916597),p+(-111036-(-111037))if w[q]==-349770-(-349770)then w[q],W[q]=nil,nil end q=z[p]end end,{}return(j(520958+-380840,{}))(H(t))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[p(1013492+-1066095)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
